det_check_template:
proof fn det_free_page_table(pre_self_: MemoryManager, proc_ptr: ProcPtr, pcid: Pcid, post1_self_: MemoryManager, r1: (), post2_self_: MemoryManager, r2: ())
    requires (pre_self_.wf()), (pre_self_.pcid_active(pcid)), (pre_self_.pcid_to_proc_ptr(pcid) == proc_ptr), (0 <= pcid < PCID_MAX), (pre_self_.get_pagetable_by_pcid(pcid).unwrap().is_empty()),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_self_.wf())
            &&& (post1_self_.kernel_entries =~= pre_self_.kernel_entries)
            &&& (post1_self_.kernel_entries_ghost =~= pre_self_.kernel_entries_ghost)
            &&& (post1_self_.page_tables =~= pre_self_.page_tables)
            &&& (post1_self_.page_table_pages =~= pre_self_.page_table_pages)
            &&& (post1_self_.free_ioids =~= pre_self_.free_ioids)
            &&& (post1_self_.iommu_tables =~= pre_self_.iommu_tables)
            &&& (post1_self_.iommu_table_pages =~= pre_self_.iommu_table_pages)
            &&& (post1_self_.root_table =~= pre_self_.root_table)
            &&& (post1_self_.root_table_cache =~= pre_self_.root_table_cache)
            &&& (post1_self_.pci_bitmap =~= pre_self_.pci_bitmap)
            &&& (post1_self_.page_table_pages@.dom() =~= pre_self_.page_table_pages@.dom())
            &&& (forall|p: Pcid|
                #![trigger post1_self_.pcid_active(p)]
                p != pcid ==> post1_self_.pcid_active(p) == pre_self_.pcid_active(p))
            &&& (forall|i: IOid|
                #![trigger post1_self_.ioid_active(i)]
                post1_self_.ioid_active(i) == pre_self_.ioid_active(i))
            &&& (forall|p: Pcid|
                #![trigger post1_self_.pcid_active(p)]
                #![trigger post1_self_.get_pagetable_mapping_by_pcid(p)]
                post1_self_.pcid_active(p) && p != pcid ==> pre_self_.get_pagetable_mapping_by_pcid(p)
                    == post1_self_.get_pagetable_mapping_by_pcid(p))
            &&& (forall|i: IOid|
                #![trigger post1_self_.ioid_active(i)]
                #![trigger post1_self_.get_iommu_table_mapping_by_ioid(i)]
                post1_self_.ioid_active(i) ==> pre_self_.get_iommu_table_mapping_by_ioid(i)
                    == post1_self_.get_iommu_table_mapping_by_ioid(i))
            &&& (forall|p: Pcid|
                #![trigger post1_self_.pcid_active(p)]
                #![trigger post1_self_.pcid_to_proc_ptr(p)]
                post1_self_.pcid_active(p) && p != pcid ==> pre_self_.pcid_to_proc_ptr(p)
                    == post1_self_.pcid_to_proc_ptr(p))
            &&& (forall|i: IOid|
                #![trigger post1_self_.ioid_active(i)]
                #![trigger post1_self_.ioid_to_proc_ptr(i)]
                post1_self_.ioid_active(i) ==> pre_self_.ioid_to_proc_ptr(i) == post1_self_.ioid_to_proc_ptr(i))
            &&& (post1_self_.pcid_active(pcid) == false)
            &&& (post2_self_.wf())
            &&& (post2_self_.kernel_entries =~= pre_self_.kernel_entries)
            &&& (post2_self_.kernel_entries_ghost =~= pre_self_.kernel_entries_ghost)
            &&& (post2_self_.page_tables =~= pre_self_.page_tables)
            &&& (post2_self_.page_table_pages =~= pre_self_.page_table_pages)
            &&& (post2_self_.free_ioids =~= pre_self_.free_ioids)
            &&& (post2_self_.iommu_tables =~= pre_self_.iommu_tables)
            &&& (post2_self_.iommu_table_pages =~= pre_self_.iommu_table_pages)
            &&& (post2_self_.root_table =~= pre_self_.root_table)
            &&& (post2_self_.root_table_cache =~= pre_self_.root_table_cache)
            &&& (post2_self_.pci_bitmap =~= pre_self_.pci_bitmap)
            &&& (post2_self_.page_table_pages@.dom() =~= pre_self_.page_table_pages@.dom())
            &&& (forall|p: Pcid|
                #![trigger post2_self_.pcid_active(p)]
                p != pcid ==> post2_self_.pcid_active(p) == pre_self_.pcid_active(p))
            &&& (forall|i: IOid|
                #![trigger post2_self_.ioid_active(i)]
                post2_self_.ioid_active(i) == pre_self_.ioid_active(i))
            &&& (forall|p: Pcid|
                #![trigger post2_self_.pcid_active(p)]
                #![trigger post2_self_.get_pagetable_mapping_by_pcid(p)]
                post2_self_.pcid_active(p) && p != pcid ==> pre_self_.get_pagetable_mapping_by_pcid(p)
                    == post2_self_.get_pagetable_mapping_by_pcid(p))
            &&& (forall|i: IOid|
                #![trigger post2_self_.ioid_active(i)]
                #![trigger post2_self_.get_iommu_table_mapping_by_ioid(i)]
                post2_self_.ioid_active(i) ==> pre_self_.get_iommu_table_mapping_by_ioid(i)
                    == post2_self_.get_iommu_table_mapping_by_ioid(i))
            &&& (forall|p: Pcid|
                #![trigger post2_self_.pcid_active(p)]
                #![trigger post2_self_.pcid_to_proc_ptr(p)]
                post2_self_.pcid_active(p) && p != pcid ==> pre_self_.pcid_to_proc_ptr(p)
                    == post2_self_.pcid_to_proc_ptr(p))
            &&& (forall|i: IOid|
                #![trigger post2_self_.ioid_active(i)]
                #![trigger post2_self_.ioid_to_proc_ptr(i)]
                post2_self_.ioid_active(i) ==> pre_self_.ioid_to_proc_ptr(i) == post2_self_.ioid_to_proc_ptr(i))
            &&& (post2_self_.pcid_active(pcid) == false)
        }) ==> det_free_page_table_equal(r1, r2, post1_self_, post2_self_),
{
{ASSUMES}}
